job.title: Staff Backend Engineer @ Okta (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Secure Every Identity, from AI to Human**  
  
Identity is the key to unlocking the potential of AI. Okta secures AI by building the trusted, neutral infrastructure that enables organizations to safely embrace this new era. This work requires a relentless drive to solve complex challenges with real-world stakes. We are looking for builders and owners who operate with speed and urgency and execute with excellence.  
  
This is an opportunity to do career-defining work. We're all in on this mission. If you are too, let's talk.

**Staff Backend Engineer**

We’re redefining **Privileged Access Management (PAM)** from the ground up, purpose-built for Cloud, SaaS, Databases, Containers, and any virtualized environment. Our mission is to simplify and secure workforce access with **seamless, secure-by-default workflows** that adapt dynamically to modern infrastructure. We eliminate standing privileges, enforce least privilege, and embed **Zero Trust** principles into every access workflow by default.

### **About the Role**

We are seeking a **Staff Backend Engineer** to serve as the core technical anchor and senior Individual Contributor (IC) for our newly established engineering pod in India. At the P4 level, your primary sphere of influence will be at the **team level**—taking ownership of complex, ambiguous problems and defining *how* to solve them cleanly, securely, and efficiently.

In this role, you will lead by example through hands-on architecture, high-velocity coding, and end-to-end execution. You will drive the implementation of secure database and network device connectors (routers, switches, firewalls) on top of our core Zero Standing Privileges (ZSP) platform. You will work closely with our local Technical Team Lead to elevate the pod’s engineering craft, acting as a **technical multiplier** for mid-level developers while ensuring tight architectural alignment with our global team.

### **What You’ll Be Doing**

#### **Execution & Technical Impact**

* **End-to-End Ownership:** Consistently design, code, debug, test, monitor, and deploy performant backend services and connector plugins in Go.
* **Define the "How":** Take well-defined product goals and ambiguous technical challenges, break them down into modular technical designs, and execute them with minimal oversight.
* **Component Architecture:** Design reliable, scalable components for database scraping and network protocol management (SSH, Telnet, SNMP) using spikes, proof-of-concepts, and telemetry to back up architectural decisions.

#### **Operational Excellence & Engineering Craft**

* **Guardian Support & Incident Ownership:** Actively participate in global on-call rotation. Demonstrate system-level understanding to troubleshoot complex incidents, perform root-cause analysis, and build remediation automation.
* **Drive Team Velocity:** Identify tech debt, streamline CI/CD pipelines, improve observability/alerting, and establish technical documentation to keep the team moving fast over the long term.
* **Risk Management:** Proactively spot technical risks, dependency gaps, and performance bottlenecks in your team's projects before they impact delivery.

#### **Team Multiplier & Strategic Alignment**

* **Technical Mentorship:** Elevate the team's craft by conducting thorough, constructive code reviews, establishing best practices in Go, and pairing with P2/P3 engineers.
* **Global Collaboration:** Partner with global Technical Leads to review major design proposals, manage dependencies, and ensure local execution matches global architecture strategy.

### **What You’ll Bring to the Role**

* **7+ years of software engineering experience**, with 3+ years spent building high-scale, cloud-native backend systems.
* **Proven Staff-Level (P4) Attributes:** Demonstrated ability to independently own large tasks end-to-end, influence technical decisions across a team, and elevate the performance of surrounding engineers.
* **Domain & Protocol Expertise:** Experience in **Privileged Access Management (PAM)**, **Identity & Access Management (IAM)**, or deep networking infrastructure. Familiarity with credential management, asset discovery, or agentless communication patterns.
* **Hands-on Go Proficiency:** Strong engineering skills in **Go** (or deep expertise in C++/Rust/Java with a proven record of mastering Go quickly).
* **Distributed Systems & Networking:** Hands-on experience with networking protocols (SSH, Telnet, TCP/IP), database security, microservices, and asynchronous event-driven systems.
* **Cloud & Operational Toolkit:** Familiarity with **AWS**, **Kubernetes**, **Docker**, CI/CD automation, and modern telemetry/observability tools.
* **Multiplier Mindset:** High empathy, humility, and clear communication skills with a focus on sharing knowledge, soliciting feedback, and driving a positive engineering culture.

### **Extra Credit If You Have:**

* Direct experience at domain leaders in security/PAM such as **CyberArk**, **Delinea**, or similar IAM space companies.
* Experience working with **Graph databases (e.g., ArangoDB)** or **policy engines** (e.g., OPA).
* Contributions to open-source infrastructure projects or technical blogging.

### **Our Tech Stack**

* **Language:** Go
* **Infra:** AWS, Serverless, Kubernetes
* **Data:** Postgres (RDS), ArangoDB (NoSQL)
* **DevOps:** GitHub Actions, Docker, Terraform, Helm

L1-Hybrid

P24965\_3499455

**The Okta Experience**

* Supporting Your Well-Being
* Driving Social Impact
* Developing Talent and Fostering Connection + Community

We are intentional about connection. Our global community, spanning over 20 offices worldwide, is united by a drive to innovate. Your journey begins with an immersive, in-person onboarding experience designed to accelerate your impact and connect you to our mission and team from day one.  
  
Okta is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, marital status, age, physical or mental disability, or status as a protected veteran. We also consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and convictions records, consistent with applicable laws.  
  
If reasonable accommodation is needed to complete any part of the job application, interview process, or onboarding please use this Form to request an accommodation.

In accordance with NYC Local Law 144, if you are an applicant or employee residing in New York City, please

  

Okta

The foundation for secure connections between people and technology

Okta is the leading independent provider of identity for the enterprise. The Okta Identity Cloud enables organizations to securely connect the right people to the right technologies at the right time. With over 7,000 pre-built integrations to applications and infrastructure providers, Okta customers can easily and securely use the best technologies for their business. More than 19,300 organizations, including JetBlue, Nordstrom, Slack, T-Mobile, Takeda, Teach for America, and Twilio, trust Okta to help protect the identities of their workforces and customers.

job.title: Lead Software Engr @ Honeywell (KA, IN)
job.description:
The Lead Software Engineer must partner with domain SMEs to enhance System Testing practices, provide technical leadership and be evangelist of quality. He/She needs to enhance overall product quality, help to implement quality transformation initiatives leveraging contemporary AI tools in system integration testing and enabling AI first framework in product validation. Drive clear vision for AI native testing applicable to Honeywell products. Drive culture of innovation, blend both HON domain content with latest Tech content in Integration Tests. This pivotal role bridges the gap between deep industrial domain expertise and enterprise grade software testing. He/She needs to influence architectural decisions for NPIs serving both upstream and downstream O&G operations. Partner with executive leadership, offering and project teams to champion product quality, drive transformation wrt quality, establish early feedback mechanism. Need to participate in recognized Oil and Gas industry forums and influence the forum in shaping standards related to process control, process optimization and refinery operations.

  

Required Qualifications

Domain & Technical Expertise

* Industrial Domain: Deep understanding of refinery operations, process optimization, and process control systems.

* Industry Verticals: Comprehensive understanding of engineering workflows across Upstream and Downstream oil and gas sectors.

* Systems Thinking: Sound foundational knowledge of enterprise software systems, cloud-native deployments, and distributed systems.

* HON Tech Evangelist: Has sound understating of Industrial purdue model, HON offerings across the levels and Value added software solutions and services

* Quality Advocate: Proven track record of applying continuous improvement methodologies to software processes.

Software Engineering Capabilities

* SIT Leadership: Expert-level mastery in managing complex, large-scale system integration testing (SIT).

* AI & Automation: Practical understanding of Agentic driven software testing

* Strong understanding of Agile process for Software development and Testing

* Trained in managing quality process for large enterprise software products

Leadership & Soft Skills

* Executive Presence: Exceptional communicator and skilled negotiator capable of influencing both internal stakeholders and external clients.

* Team Developer: Proven capability to coach technical teams through transformative architectural changes.

* Effective negotiator and good communicator, able to break business complex discussion to simple novice engineers understandable language

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience with Honeywell’s legacy or current industrial software stacks (e.g., Experion PKS, Honeywell Forge, Industrial Enterprise Apps ).

* Had external view about Honeywell offering, must have implemented HON or Non HON systems to end customers

* Participated in join testing with customers

  

Core Responsibilities

Quality Leadership

* Establish strategic partnership with involve key stakeholders to enable AI first SDLC / STLC to systematically improve product quality.

* Develop Customer centric product validation partnering with HON project and Customer support teams. This must result in tangible output like reduced defect leakages, enhanced customer satisfaction on quality

* Set untiring quality Entry and Exit Criteria working with product architects and TPOs. Tighten the pipeline quality gates working with DevOps teams.

* Act as a technical evangelist and drive modern software testing practices for both cloud, edge and on prem systems. Influence product architecture decisions.

* Be the innovation champion and creating a culture of Innovation. Conduct Innovation workshops on domain.

* Deploy common Software Testing process, practices across product lines, accelerate the feedback loop on quality

* Sharing the product quality metrics with leadership teams on set frequency. Drive facts based actions to continuously improve product quality.

* Be part of steering team committee to drive quality initiatives, identify key quality KPIs and socialize these KPIs within and across the departments

* Drive Monitoring capabilities to cloud apps; Work with SRE and Enable flawless promotion to production

Domain Integration & Testing

* End-to-End System Integration: Lead end-to-end system integration testing (SIT) for complex and large industrial software products.

* Institutionalise Guardrails: Collaborate with the Honeywell Connected Industrials (HCI) leadership team to define and institutionalise strict system testing entry and exit criteria.

* Refinery Domain Mastery: Translate complex upstream and downstream refinery operations into resilient, software-driven solutions.

Customer Alignment & Collaboration

* Front-End Customer Engagement: Act as the primary technical face for customers, helping them to address their technical / quality concerns.

* Cross-Functional Communication: Partner with cross-functional product management, engineering, and HCI executive leadership to align technical roadmaps with business goals.

* Team Mentorship: Coach, mentor, and guide senior engineers and technical architects to elevate engineering excellence across the organisation.

  

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

job.title: Senior Solutions Engineer @ Couchbase, Inc. (MH, IN)
job.description:
Couchbase, the operational data platform for AI, empowers businesses to succeed by bringing data to life in new ways. Major market-leading companies rely on Couchbase for mission critical operational, analytical, mobile and AI workloads. Built to replace legacy infrastructure and fragmented data services, Couchbase empowers enterprises with a unified platform architected for performance, flexibility and global scale.

With Couchbase, organizations bring their data to life, launching game‑changing customer experiences, exploring the limitless potential of AI, and seamlessly extending applications from the cloud to the edge and beyond. Couchbase's AI‑ready technology and enterprise partnership model eliminate complexity and reduce total cost of ownership, enabling teams to stay agile, innovative and secure.

Couchbase believes data should never slow you down, but act as the foundation for your next breakthrough. Discover why Couchbase is trusted to help the world's biggest players scale, move fast and stay resilient, no matter what's next on their roadmap. Visit couchbase.com and follow us on LinkedIn and X.  
  
Want to be part of our story? Apply today!

**Sr Solutions Engineer**  
  
We are looking for a Sr Solution Engineer in Mumbai to support the rapidly growing Couchbase user community and help drive customer success.  
  
Our Solution (Pre-Sales) Engineers are the primary technical field experts, responsible for actively driving and managing the technical components of a sales engagement. This includes explaining Couchbase advantages and differentiators, and how our Couchbase solutions stack meets these customer challenges, all while getting customers excited about using this new approach for delivering consistent business value.  
  
This specific position focuses on assisting customers who interact with our technology via application code and the application development process. This development centric position requires experience in presales, software development experience as well as time developing business solutions. Experience with one or more Enterprise Programming Languages and Solution Development methodologies.  
  
**Location: Mumbai**

  

Responsibilities  
  

* Operate in a consultative process with customers and prospects to define their challenges and opportunities. Map these challenges to the Couchbase Ecosystem by presenting differentiating and sustainable business value.
* Educate and become a trusted advisor and challenge assumptions and current status while delivering value to the prospects and customers.
* Present art of the possible and think outside the box approaches and solutions.
* Support technical and business discovery activities including workshops, demonstrations, across multiple opportunities
* Work closely with the sales team on account strategy and identifying additional opportunities in existing and new accounts. Ensuring the success of customer PoC/Pilots through effective management of acceptance criteria and issue escalation/resolution.
* Develop and deliver exceptional and engaging company/product presentations and demonstrations. Work with all technical levels from managers, to architects and developers and explain the Couchbase Ecosystem and its applicability to business objectives and business value
* Be the technical product expert and advisor for customers and stay up-to-date on the data solutions competitive landscape
* Partner with Product Management and Engineering to provide feedback from the field and represent the customer perspective
* Identify and write internal and external technical collateral, like typical deployment architectures or best practices and industry standards.

  
Preferred Qualifications  
  

* 5+ years in a Pre-Sales/Customer-Facing/Consulting Role
* 2+ years of experience in software development or related industries
* Familiarity with NoSQL databases or other distributed high-performance systems
* Excellent presentation skills with an ability to present technical solutions concisely to customers or potential customers all the way from development roles to the C-Suite
* Passion for diving into technical issues and solving customer challenges
* Programming skills with any one of the following: Java, Python, Javascript, .NET. C, SQL
* Experienced in at least one of the major cloud services providers (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Experienced in designing solutions on at least one major database platform including data modeling, indexes and query optimization.

  
Desirables  
  

* Experience with virtualization and containerization technologies (i.e. Docker, Kubernetes, Openshift, Containers etc)
* Experience with database platform development is a plus.
* Hands on experience with development at large scale

At Couchbase, we believe innovation thrives when diverse perspectives are at the table. We actively encourage applications from individuals of all backgrounds—including women, people of color, LGTBQIA+ professionals, veterans, and individuals with disabilities. If you see a role that excites you, but don't meet every qualification, we still encourage you to apply.

Studies show underrepresented talent is less likely to apply unless they meet all the criteria. We encourage you to apply if you're excited about the role and can bring strong contributions to our team.

If you require reasonable accommodations during the recruitment process, please let your recruiter know—we're happy to support you.

We value diverse educational and career backgrounds. If your experience aligns with the role's goals—even if it doesn't follow a traditional path—we'd love to hear from you.

**Why Couchbase?**

Modern customer experiences need a flexible cloud database platform that can power applications spanning from cloud to edge and everything in between. Couchbase's mission is to simplify how developers and architects develop, deploy and consume modern applications wherever they are. We have reimagined the database with our fast, flexible and affordable cloud database platform Capella, allowing organizations to quickly build applications that deliver premium experiences to their customers– all with best-in-class price performance. More than 30% of the Fortune 100 trust Couchbase to power their modern applications and build innovative new ones. See our recent awards to learn why Couchbase is a great place to work.We are honored to be a part of the Best Places to Work Award for the Bay Area and the UK. Couchbase offers a total rewards approach to benefits that recognizes the value you create here, so that you in turn may best serve yourself and your family. Some benefits include:

* Generous Time Off Program - Flexibility to care for you and your family
* Wellness Benefits - A variety of world class medical plans to choose from, along with dental, vision, life insurance, and employee assistance programs\*
* Financial Planning - Retirement program\* and Business Travel Insurance
* Career Growth - Be valued, Create value approach
* Fun Perks - An ergonomic and comfortable in-office / WFH setup. Food & Snacks for in-office employees.
* And much more!

* Note: some programs are not applicable to all countries. Please discuss with a Couchbase recruiter to learn more.

**Learn more about Couchbase:**  
News and Press Releases  
Couchbase Capella  
Couchbase Blog  
Investors

**Disclaimer:**

Couchbase is committed to being an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability and protected veterans' status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Join an impact initiative group and experience the amazing feeling of Couchbase can-do culture.

By using this website and submitting your information, you acknowledge our Candidate Privacy Notice and understand your personal information may be processed in accordance with our Candidate Privacy Notice following guidelines in your country of application.

job.description:

**Location:** Noida, UP, India
  
  
**#job-location.job-location-inline { display:** inline; }
  
  
**Company:** Iris Software
  
  
Why Join Iris?
  
Are you ready to do the best work of your career at one of India’s Top 25 Best Workplaces in IT industry? Do you want to grow in an award-winning culture that truly values your talent and ambitions?
  
Join Iris Software — one of the fastest-growing IT services companies — where you own and shape your success story.
  
  
About Us
  
At Iris Software, our vision is to be our client’s most trusted technology partner, and the first choice for the industry’s top professionals to realize their full potential.
  
With over 4,300 associates across India, U.S.A, and Canada, we help our enterprise clients thrive with technology-enabled transformation across financial services, healthcare, transportation & logistics, and professional services.
  
Our work covers complex, mission-critical applications with the latest technologies, such as high-value complex Application & Product Engineering, Data & Analytics, Cloud, DevOps, Data & MLOps, Quality Engineering, and Business Automation.
  
  
Working with Us
  
At Iris, every role is more than a job — it’s a launchpad for growth.
  
Our Employee Value Proposition, “Build Your Future. Own Your Journey.” reflects our belief that people thrive when they have ownership of their career and the right opportunities to shape it.
  
We foster a culture where your potential is valued, your voice matters, and your work creates real impact. With cutting-edge projects, personalized career development, continuous learning and mentorship, we support you to grow and become your best — both personally and professionally.
  
Curious what it’s like to work at Iris? Head to this video for an inside look at the people, the passion, and the possibilities. Watch it here.
  
Job Description
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Design and develop full stack scalable enterprise applications using ASP.NET Web API, Angular, and Microservices architecture. Ensure applications aligned with business goals and architecture standards.

**Job Description**

The DST Business Analyst and Business Intelligence Developer for Husky will be responsible for designing, delivering, and maintaining the company’s enterprise business intelligence ecosystem, leveraging both internal and external data sources. This role will lead the development and support of enterprise-wide BI applications, data models, and analytics architecture. Working closely with senior business and IT stakeholders, the position will translate strategic data and information requirements into actionable solutions that enable data-driven decision making.

The incumbent will address complex technical challenges, optimize performance across BI platforms, and define data elements that drive meaningful insights and measurable business value. The role will also establish testing standards, develop and deliver training programs to enhance user adoption, and promote self‑service analytics. Additionally, this position will define governance standards, policies, and procedures for BI tools and data structures, establish data quality metrics, and evaluate emerging technologies to support continuous improvement of Husky’s enterprise BI capabilities.

**Key Responsibilities & Key Success Metrics**

* Leading BI software development, deployment and maintenance
* Perform Data Profiling and Data Analysis activities to understand data sources
* Report curation, template definition and analytical data modeling
* Work with cross-functional teams to gather and document reporting requirements
* Translate business requirements into specifications that will be used to implement the required reports and dashboards, created from potentially multiple data sources
* Identifies and resolves data reporting issues in a timely fashion, while looking for continuous improvement opportunities.
* Build solutions that create value and resolve business problems
* Provide technical guidance to designers and other stakeholders
* Work effectively with members of Digital Solutions Team
* Troubleshoots analytics tool problems and tunes for performance
* Develops semantic layer and analytics query objects for end users
* Translation of business questions and requirements into reports, views, and analytics query objects
* Ensuring that quality standards are met
* Supporting Master Data Management Strategy

**Qualifications:**

**Technical Skills & Experience**

* Strong understanding of ERP and operational system data structures, with the ability to interpret, navigate, and optimize complex relational databases.
* Advanced proficiency in writing high‑performance SQL queries against large‑scale, complex datasets, including optimization and troubleshooting.
* Hands‑on experience in data visualization, dashboard design, and data storytelling, with the ability to translate analytical insights into clear, compelling, and actionable narratives.
* Experience designing, debugging, and deploying BI solutions within an Azure DevOps (ADO) environment, including CI/CD practices, version control, and release management.
* Proficiency with the Microsoft BI Stack, including:

* Power BI (data modeling, DAX, visualization best practices, Power BI Service)
* SQL Server Analysis Services (SSAS/AAS)—tabular model development, optimization, and deployment

Experience working with Azure Data Platform services such as Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS), Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Synapse Analytics, and Power BI Service.

Knowledge of Databricks or Microsoft Fabric is considered a strong asset.

**Business & Functional Knowledge**

* Basic understanding of manufacturing and sales business processes, with the ability to translate operational requirements into analytical solutions.
* Experience working in an international or distributed business environment, collaborating across regions and time zones.

**Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills**

* Strong analytical capabilities, with the ability to interpret requirements, profile data, validate output, and ensure accuracy across BI solutions.
* Adept at diagnosing data inconsistencies, performance issues, and modeling challenges, proposing effective, scalable solutions.

**Communication & Collaboration**

* Excellent communication and presentation skills, capable of conveying technical concepts to business stakeholders in clear, understandable terms.
* Ability to facilitate meetings, workshops, and design sessions, enabling effective collaboration and informed decision-making.
* Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work collaboratively with cross‑functional teams, including Data Engineering, Business Analysts, and business partners.

**Language Requirements**

* Proficiency in English is required.
* Knowledge of German or French is considered an asset.
